meaning: n.机械师,机械工,机械安装修理工
examples: His father is a machinist in an aerospace plant.
Steve Jobs was a college dropout. He was adopted by a machinist and his wife, an accountant.
The Marine Corps experience launched my machinist career. It also made me realize that learning how-to-learn is a powerful tool.
The Industrial Revolution got a serious boost in 1864 when a machinist standardized screws.
The unemployed machinist launched his action against the band in the city's superior court.
